(centos7)All results and logs: https://testing.whamcloud.com/gerrit-janitor/21909/results.html
No additional testing was requested

Patch Set 1:

It looks like the Nanitor testing is skipping this subtest "client encryption not supported"

Patch Set 1:

> It looks like the Nanitor testing is skipping this subtest "client
 > encryption not supported"

That's because client encryption requires Ubuntu 20 or CentOS 8 on client side to run. Oleg, would it be possible to switch some of Lustre Gerrit Janitor testing to CentOS 8?

Patch Set 1:

> > It looks like the Nanitor testing is skipping this subtest
 > "client
 > > encryption not supported"
 > 
 > That's because client encryption requires Ubuntu 20 or CentOS 8 on
 > client side to run. Oleg, would it be possible to switch some of
 > Lustre Gerrit Janitor testing to CentOS 8?

Oleg isn't CC'd on this patch, and often misses comments because he is CC'd on so many others.  I'd suggest to file an ATM ticket and assign it directly to Oleg so that he sees it.  It definitely makes sense to change at least 1/2 of the test sessions to el8.

Patch Set 1:

Note also that these patches should all be abandoned rather than leaving them around.

Patch Set 1:

Thanks for the tip, I have created ATM-2338 for that purpose. I will not abandon this patch for now, so that it is easy to re-run Lustre Gerrit Janitor later. But yes, I will abandon it and its siblings as soon as they are not needed anymore.

Patch Set 1: Code-Review-1

This change cannot be cherry-picked to master.
Please rebase the change locally and upload the rebased commit for review.

Removed reviewer WC Checkpatch with the following votes:

* Code-Review-1 by WC Checkpatch (377)

Patch Set 1:

Code-wise looks good to me.

parents.subject: LU-15512 lnet: Stop discovery on deleted peer NI

commit.subject: LU-15608 debug: test correctness of DIO for encrypted files
commit.message:
LU-15608 debug: test correctness of DIO for encrypted files

This is a debug patch to test correctness of DIO for encrypted files.

Test-Parameters: fortestonly
Test-Parameters: testlist=sanity-sec env=ONLY=44 mdscount=1 mdtcount=2 osscount=1 ostcount=2 clientcount=1 clientarch=x86_64 clientdistro=el8.3 serverdistro=el8.3 fstype=ldiskfs
Signed-off-by: Sebastien Buisson <sbuisson@ddn.com>
Change-Id: If3d931a7846e8264db23cd4efc031ce4c86308f4
